articles.title: Crypto Derivatives Trading Volume Plunges in December As Sector Reckons With FTX Fallout: Report
articles.description: A new report from blockchain market data provider CryptoCompare shows a massive decline in crypto derivatives trading activities last month following the collapse of industry giant FTX in November. In its latest Exchange Review, CryptoCompare reports that derivatives volumes dropped by 52.7% in December to $1.16 trillion. Critical Vulnerability on Polkadot Parachains Discovered, $200 Million at Risk
articles.description: A security researcher discovered a potential vulnerability that could have resulted in the theft of up to $200 million from three Ethereum-compatible parachains on the Polkadot network: Moonbeam, Astar Network and Acala. The vulnerability was found in June in Frontier, a software used for “wrapping” native tokens on the three blockchain projects on the Polkadot network.
